name: Redwire

overview.value: Redwire Corporation is an American aerospace manufacturer and space infrastructure technology company headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida. The company was formed on June 1, 2020, by the private equity firm AE Industrial Partners, through the combination of its portfolio companies Adcole Space and Deep Space Systems. Redwire went public in January 2021.

focus.value: Aerospace manufacturing and space infrastructure technology

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.

events.headline: AE Industrial Partners combines Deep Space Systems and Adcole Space to form Redwire
Redwire acquires Made In Space, adding on-orbit manufacturing technology
Redwire acquires Roccor, adding deployable structures and antenna manufacturing
Redwire completes its SPAC merger with Genesis Park Acquisition Corp and begins trading on the NYSE
Redwire completes acquisition of Edge Autonomy, expanding into defense uncrewed systems
